scotland_office.name: SCOTLAND OFFICE AND OFFICE OF THE ADVOCATE GENERAL

nhs_provider_overlap.description: Same logic as 2024: NHS Trust funding shown in both DHSC > NHS Trusts (commissioner view) and NHS Provider Sector top-level node (provider/spending view).

oscar_2023_data_quality_fix.description: OSCAR 2023 contains a £114.07B 'Non-patient-facing NHS expenditure' line inside DHSC > NHS Trusts that does NOT exist in OSCAR 2024 and represents a data quality artifact. The line is approximately the size of NHS England commissioning flows that OSCAR 2023 mis-categorized cross-node, likely a schema cleanup that happened between OSCAR 2023 and OSCAR 2024 releases.
evidence: OSCAR 2024 has no equivalent 'Non-patient-facing NHS expenditure' line in NHS Trusts
After removal, NHS Trusts residual £0.405B / TAC £124.22B = 0.3% overhead, mirroring 2024's clean 3.6% ratio

DHSC + NHS Provider Sector total £220.23B reconciles closely with HM Treasury PSA 2022/23 published DHSC DEL £181.7B (within ~£40B which corresponds to NHS England commissioning being shown separately as a sibling rather than consolidated)

DHSC_total_DEL_2022_23.source: HM Treasury Public Spending Statistics July 2023

oscar_2023_data_quality_fix.applied_via: scripts/fix_oscar_2023_nhs.js (sets _oscar_2023_fix=true on DHSC > NHS Trusts node)

note: Three sources of double-counting/data quality fixes: (1) Barnett Formula block grants (£88B) appear in both Central Government and devolved government budgets. (2) NHS Trust funding (£124B) shown in both DHSC commissioning view and NHS Provider Sector spending view — netted via scripts/net_nhs_overlap.js. (3) OSCAR 2023 specific £114B 'Non-patient-facing NHS expenditure' artifact that doesn't exist in OSCAR 2024 — removed via scripts/fix_oscar_2023_nhs.js. After all fixes, root drops from £1,610B (raw OSCAR) to £1,372B, and DHSC drops from £334B to £96B. (4) MHCLG Local Government grants (£30B) overlap with LA England branch (disclosure only, not deducted).
source: HM Treasury OSCAR II + NHS England TAC 2022/23 + MHCLG Revenue Outturn

history.change: OSCAR 2023 data quality fix applied. Root dropped from £1,486.6B to £1,372.5B after removing £114.07B Non-patient-facing artifact. DHSC residual now £0.405B (consistent with 2024 ratio).
